decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 polish vs Canvas foundation work
decisions.context: Heavy backlog of Explore V2 UX polish tickets (data selector, channel list v2, attributes assign, saved panel configs) competing with Canvas infrastructure needs (Docker/K8s jobs). Need to decide Q1 focus: nail current Explore experience or build Canvas foundation.

arguments.for: Explore V2 polish directly impacts North Star (decisions captured) by reducing friction in existing workflows. 15+ polish tickets suggest user pain points affecting adoption.
arguments.against: Canvas is key 2026 moat differentiator. Delaying infrastructure work (ENG-9001) risks H2 Canvas launch timeline and competitive positioning.

decisions.title: Address production stability issues now or gate features
decisions.context: Critical production issues emerging: data-batcher OOMs (ENG-9133), RDS scaling needed (ENG-8424), session auth loops (ENG-8293), alert ordering bugs (ENG-9091). Cost pressure (ENG-9068) adds urgency. Risk: destabilizes customer trust.

arguments.for: Production stability is table stakes for 'Embed Deeper' pillar. Auth loops and OOMs block customer workflows, directly harming retention and expansion.
arguments.against: Feature velocity slowdown risks competitive loss. Customers bought roadmap vision (Python Rules, Sift Edge). Over-indexing on stability may signal stagnation.

decisions.title: Invest in MemTable fresh data reads for real-time edge cases
decisions.context: ENG-8228 implements fresh data reads from MemTable, enabling real-time signal→decision loops for Sift Edge use cases. Aligns with 2026 'Build the Moat' via edge computing differentiation but adds backend complexity.
decisions.blockedBy: Need customer validation that real-time latency (<1s) matters for edge decisions vs. current 5-10s batch processing

arguments.for: Real-time data access is core to edge value prop. Enables predictive maintenance, anomaly detection at machine speed—key moat vs cloud-only competitors.
arguments.against: Premature optimization. No customers have explicitly requested <1s latency. Backend complexity may destabilize ingestion pipeline (already seeing OOMs).

decisions.title: Sunset getazimuth.com domain or maintain dual-domain support indefinitely
decisions.context: ENG-9121 updates certs for both siftstack.com and getazimuth.com. Legacy branding creates confusion, doubles maintenance. Need decision: hard cutover timeline or permanent support.

arguments.for: Clean brand = clear market positioning. Dual domains confuse customers, fragment SEO, complicate ops (cert management, DNS, support docs). Rip the band-aid.
arguments.against: Enterprise customers have hardcoded URLs in automation scripts, dashboards, integrations. Forced migration risks churn in renewal conversations.

decisions.title: Publish API docs for nested calculated channel rules before or after Python Rules GA
decisions.context: ENG-9048 identifies need to update API docs for nested calc channels. Python Rules launching Q2 will overhaul rule creation paradigm. Question: document current system now or wait for Python Rules to avoid double documentation effort.

arguments.for: Current customers need docs now to self-serve advanced use cases. Waiting 2+ months blocks power users, increases support load, slows 'Decisions Captured' growth.
arguments.against: Python Rules will deprecate current rule UX. Documenting soon-to-be-legacy system wastes cycles and confuses users mid-transition. Hold for unified Python docs.

timeAudit.weekSummary: 62% meeting load indicates decision bottleneck risk. 3 one-on-ones suggest org alignment needs but compress execution time.
alerts: Only 2 focus blocks scheduled this week—insufficient for deep strategic work on Canvas/Python Rules roadmap
22 meetings this week: recommend blocking Fri PM for decision documentation and stakeholder async updates
Zero Canvas-related meetings scheduled despite 'Build the Moat' being off-track—prioritization mismatch?

events.title: Production Stability Decision Gate
events.description: Go/no-go on pausing feature work to address OOMs, RDS scaling, auth loops. Requires eng capacity forecast and customer impact analysis.

events.title: Explore V2 Polish Sprint Kickoff
events.description: Triage 15+ UX polish tickets. Prioritize data selector, channel list v2, saved configs based on user friction data.

events.title: Weekly Product Sync
events.description: Review North Star metrics (+12% decisions captured). Discuss 'Build the Moat' off-track status and Canvas acceleration plan.

events.title: Customer Advisory Board Prep
events.description: Validate real-time edge latency requirements (ENG-8228 blocker). Collect feedback on Python Rules beta interest.

events.title: Explore V2 vs Canvas Focus Decision Deadline
events.description: Finalize Q1 prioritization: double down on Explore polish or shift resources to Canvas infrastructure (Docker/K8s).

events.title: MemTable Fresh Reads Customer Validation
events.description: Complete interviews with 3 edge pilot customers to validate <1s latency requirement. Unblocks ENG-8228 investment decision.

events.title: RDS Scaling Maintenance Window
events.description: Scale production RDS instance (ENG-8424). Expected 15-min downtime. Customer notifications sent Mar 18.

events.title: Domain Strategy Decision Deadline
events.description: Decide: sunset getazimuth.com with migration timeline or commit to indefinite dual-domain support.

events.title: API Documentation Decision Gate
events.description: Approve nested calc channel API docs publication or defer until Python Rules GA to avoid redundant documentation.

events.title: Python Rules Closed Beta Launch
events.description: Target 12 beta users by end of month. Key moat differentiator for technical customers. Requires ENG-8953 polish completion.

events.title: Canvas Private Beta Expansion
events.description: Scale from 8 to 25 signups. Requires ENG-9001 Docker/K8s infrastructure completion and customer success onboarding playbook.

events.title: Sift Edge Pilot #3 Deployment
events.description: Third edge pilot (aerospace manufacturing). Tests MemTable fresh reads if customer validation succeeds. Critical for moat strategy.

events.title: Q2 Business Review
events.description: Review strategy pillar progress. Expected decisions: H2 Canvas GA timeline, Python Rules public beta criteria, edge expansion plan.

events.title: Ask SIFT Natural Language Query Beta
events.description: AI-powered query interface. Lowers barrier to 'Decisions Captured' for non-technical users. Requires LLM integration and security review.

events.title: Canvas General Availability Target
events.description: Full launch dependent on Q2 beta feedback and infrastructure stability. Key revenue driver for H2 expansion bookings.

events.title: 2027 Strategy Planning Offsite
events.description: Define 2027 pillars and North Star evolution. Review 2026 retrospective: what worked in Signal>Evidence>Decision framework.
